## Change

Describe the reusable behavior or defect being addressed.

## Regression signal

- [ ] Added or updated a deterministic fixture/test for mechanical behavior.
- [ ] Added or updated an Agent eval assertion for judgment-heavy behavior.
- [ ] Existing eval wording was preserved unless the assertion itself was invalid.

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 scripts/run_ci.py` passes.
- [ ] Official Google DESIGN.md validation passes when relevant.
- [ ] Behavioral changes were run against a previous-version or no-skill baseline in a clean eval workspace.
- [ ] Human review was recorded for any promoted benchmark.
- [ ] No private customer materials, secrets, caches, or generated eval outputs are committed.

## Compatibility and release

State whether this is patch, minor, or major and explain any artifact-contract impact.
